    ​

    Sky Gardens, DIFC

     

    This beautifully furnished 2-bedroom apartment in Sky Gardens, DIFC—one of Dubai’s most vibrant and prestigious districts. This elegant residence offers breathtaking full city views and a prime location near the city's financial hub, making it an excellent investment opportunity or a luxurious home for urban living.   

    Sky Gardens is renowned for its modern design, premium amenities, and seamless connectivity to Sheikh Zayed Road, Downtown Dubai, and Dubai Metro, ensuring convenience and exclusivity for its residents.   

    PROPERTY FEATURES:  
    - 2 Bedrooms  
    - Fully Furnished with stylish interiors  
    - 1,277.6 sqft of spacious living area  
    - Full city view  
    - Vacant and ready for immediate transfer  
    - Excellent investment with high rental demand  

    AMENITIES AND FACILITIES: 
    - Pool  
    - Fully equipped gymnasium  
    - 24/7 Concierge and Security services  
    - Elegant lobby and reception area  
    - Secure covered parking  
    - Close proximity to restaurants, cafes, and retail outlets  

    Arabian Ranches 3 June

    Arabian Ranches 3 (June)

    ​

    This elegant 4 Bedroom + Maid villa in the prestigious June community at Arabian Ranches III is thoughtfully designed for modern family living, this home features spacious interiors, premium finishes, and both wet and dry kitchens offering comfort, style, and functionality in one of Dubai’s most sought-after neighborhoods.

    ​

    Property Features:
    4 Bedrooms + Extra Living Room + Maid’s Room
    Built-up Area: 3,229.17 sq ft
    Modern Layout with High-End Finishes
    Separate Wet & Dry Kitchens
    Private Garden
    Community View

    Community Highlights:
    Landscaped Parks & Walking Trails
    BBQ Areas & Family Spaces
    Gated Community with 24/7 Security
    Close to Schools, Shopping & Dining Options


    About Arabian Ranches III – June:
    June at Arabian Ranches III offers the perfect blend of luxury and serenity, surrounded by lush greenery and world-class amenities. With easy access to major highways and city attractions, it’s an ideal choice for families and investors seeking modern suburban living in Dubai.

    Real estate is more than just buying, selling and leasing. It’s about making your dreams come true.
    We understand this and strive to provide the best possible real estate experience for our clients..
     
    Whether you are buying, selling or leasing, we will be with you every step of the way, providing support and guidance.

    ABOUT  US

    Discover the Power of Real Estate with Aresha

    WHO WE ARE



    Led by Aresha Arif, the doyenne of real estate, we are committed to delivering exceptional service with unparalleled expertise and professionalism. Aresha Real Estate, a distinguished boutique firm in Dubai, is renowned for its exclusive property deals and an influential network. With Aresha’s leadership, we offer profound industry insight and a high level of personal attention.

    Our goal is to help clients find their ideal home and ensure their satisfaction throughout the process. We value the importance of trust and personal connection in real estate, making it our priority to exceed client expectations. Whether you’re a first-time buyer or an experienced investor, Aresha Real Estate is here to guide you seamlessly through every stage of your real estate journey.

    OUR SERVICES


    Buying and Selling:

    At Aresha Real Estate, we ensure a seamless experience for buying and selling properties within your budget. Our team collaborates closely with you to analyze market trends and identify investment opportunities, ensuring your properties reach the right buyers or investors. With our experienced professionals by your side, achieving your real estate goals is effortless.

    Leasing:

    We offer exceptional service for leasing and renting properties, whether short-term or long-term. Leveraging our extensive network and industry expertise, we are dedicated to finding the ideal property to meet your needs.

    Comprehensive Support Services:

    Our strategic partnerships allow us to provide a wide range of support services, including expert mortgage advice, corporate solutions, and more. We are committed to offering comprehensive assistance to address all your real estate needs.
